M01_airy_forward_model.notes: InstrumentParams, airy_modified, airy_ideal implemented and validated

M02_calibration_synthesis.notes: synthesise_calibration_image; R_bins default set to 2000 to avoid inverse-crime artifacts

M03_annular_reduction.notes: reduce_calibration_frame, reduce_science_frame; n_subpixels default changed 8->1 to match M05 forward model discretisation

M04_airglow_synthesis.notes: synthesise_airglow_image; thermally-broadened OI 630nm line, instrument matrix A (R_bins x L_synth), Poisson noise. Confirmed functional: 256x256 image in 1.4s.

M05_calibration_inversion.notes: fit_calibration_fringe; 6-stage TRF inversion; 8/9 tests pass, T9 skipped pending FlatSat data file. chi2_noisy=1.52, chi2_noiseless=5.4 (SEM floor). t recovered to ~233 pm on noiseless synthetic data.

INT02_fpi_instrument_integration.notes: M01-M05 integration verified. V1-V5 all PASS. Visual check of 2D overlay confirmed ring alignment. chi2_reduced=1.52, t_error=202pm, wind_bias=3.03 m/s (<4.9 m/s half-budget). 5 plots saved.
